actionable_feedback: Increase sandbox/runtime limits or split work into smaller steps so the process does not time out. Save intermediate outputs early (write workbook and memo drafts incrementally).

Create [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] containing visible cell-level formulas and intermediate cells. Implement lethality per record as: lethality = duration_min * 10^((T - 80) / z). Show the exact spreadsheet formulas in cells (not only values).

Create [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] with: row-level citations (pointing to workbook row/cell addresses), explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, remediation modeling (costs vs budget), and a clear recommendation table identifying the minimal set of changed values that yields compliance.

Add an automated numeric check (script or spreadsheet sheet) that re-computes key numeric outputs with tolerance 1e-3 and fails the run if mismatches are found; include this check in actual_outputs.json and agent_trace.json.
Ensure no external data are used; operate only on embedded packet values and mark any ambiguous inputs explicitly as needs_review.
artifact_specific_comments: No output workbook or memo file was created. Final message says 'Codex run failed before producing validated trace.'
Produced logs (stderr/stdout/final_message) are preserved and show a timeout; use them to debug why file writes did not occur.
